article_title: B.C. Reg. 242/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority

briefs.title: Railway and Pipeline Track Valuation Rates Updated for 2026 Assessment Year
briefs.summary: BC Assessment has amended the Railway and Pipeline Corporations Valuation Regulation, updating per-kilometre track valuation rates across all 11 track classes and replacing pipeline diameter schedules, effective for the 2026 assessment year.
briefs.action_required: Review updated per-kilometre track and pipeline valuation rates to anticipate changes to your 2026 property tax assessment.

key_dates.label: BC Railway and Pipeline Corporations Valuation Regulation 2026 rates take effect

briefs.article_title: B.C. Reg. 242/2025 – British Columbia Assessment Authority
